case_title: LAETITIA LE ROUX VS. RICHARD DUDUM

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE ROUX, LAETITIA AS TO DEFENDANT DUDUM, RICHARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-15-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUDUM, RICHARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $820.00 FILED BY LE ROUX, LAETITIA AS TO DEFENDANT DUDUM, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
